from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an athlete (or related entities) into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    # Simple phrase mapping for better readability; fall back to a generic pattern.
    phrase_map = {
        "league": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays in the {o} league",
        "manager": lambda s, o: f"{s} is managed by {o}",
        "position": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays as a {o.lower()}",
        "ground": lambda s, o: f"{o} is the ground of {s}",
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "club": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays for {o}",
        "draftTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted by {o}",
        "height": lambda s, o: f"{s} is {o} metres tall",
        "weight": lambda s, o: f"{s} weighs {o}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} started his active years in {o}",
        "currentteam": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "currentclub": lambda s, o: f"{s} currently plays for {o}",
        "debutTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s debut team was {o}",
        "draftPick": lambda s, o: f"{s} was picked at {o}",
        "draftRound": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted in round {o}",
        "formerTeam": lambda s, o: f"{s} formerly played for {o}",
        "playerNumber": lambda s, o: f"{s} wears number {o}",
        "college": lambda s, o: f"{s} attended {o}",
        "draftYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was drafted in {o}",
        "coach": lambda s, o: f"{s} is coached by {o}",
        "owner": lambda s, o: f"{s} is owned by {o}",
        "city": lambda s, o: f"{s} is based in {o}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"{s} is led by {o}",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f"The anthem of {s} is {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"{s} has ethnic group {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"The language of {s} is {o}",
        "generalManager": lambda s, o: f"The general manager of {s} is {o}",
        "chairman": lambda s, o: f"The chairman of {s} is {o}",
        "season": lambda s, o: f"The season for {s} is {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"The currency of {s} is {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"The demonym of {s} is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
        "stadium": lambda s, o: f"The stadium of {s} is {o}",
        "universityTeam": lambda s, o: f"The university team of {s} is {o}",
        "mostChampions": lambda s, o: f"The team with most championships in {s} is {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"The leader title of {s} is {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in {o}",
        "utcOffset": lambda s, o: f"The UTC offset of {s} is {o}",
        "timeZone": lambda s, o: f"The time zone of {s} is {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"The total area of {s} is {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded on {o}",
    }

    def make_phrase(t: Triple) -> str:
        func = phrase_map.get(t.predicate)
        if func:
            return func(t.subject, t.object)
        # generic fallback
        return f"{t.subject} {t.predicate} {t.object}"

    # Build phrases for all triples
    phrases = [make_phrase(t) for t in triples]

    # Join phrases into one fluent sentence
    if not phrases:
        return ""
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        return phrases[0] + "."
    # commas between all but last, and 'and' before the final phrase
    sentence = ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."
    # Capitalise first character
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
